title: 思い出ほわほわ、わんこそば

text_block_list.text:
After arriving at the cafeteria for lunch, I notice
Yukino Bijin staring absentmindedly at the menu.
choice_data_list:
You're really burning a hole into that menu
there.

You're really burning a hole into that menu
there.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! That's not what I'm try'n to do!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
There's an extra large soba on the menu for a
limited time only, and it r'minded me of the
wanko soba back home...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Did you say... wanko soba?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: If I remember correctly, you're from Morioka, right? The birthplace of wanko soba... Gulp...
choice_data_list: (She looks like she's about to explode...)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Cool it, Oguri! You're scarin' 'em!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I just can't stop thinking about wanko
soba... Could you tell me more about the real
deal?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Gee whillikers, sure... But I'm no afici'nado, mind
you. I've only ever been on refill duty.
choice_data_list:
Refill duty? You mean dishing out more noodles
each time the customer's bowl is empty?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Righty-roo! It's quite fun. You pour in a bite-sized
serving of soba and say "heeere ya go" or "heeere
it comes."

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't great at the start, so the lady at the
restaurant had to keep helping me out.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's all fascinating... So, Yukino, if I ask you for
some wanko soba, will you serve some up?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
As if, ya doink head! She just said she was only a
refiller!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I can't make it m'self, but the wanko soba
from Morioka's really tasty!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
We've got lotsa other foods 'n fun things too, so
you should definitely visit!
choice_data_list: Now I want some wanko soba too.
Now I want some wanko soba too.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
We've got lotsa other foods 'n fun things too, so
you should definitely visit!
choice_data_list: Now I want some wanko soba too.
Now I want some wanko soba too.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's see... There's a famous festival called
the Morioka Sansa Odori.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
It's got taiko drums, flutes, and people danc'n
down the street in a p'rade!
choice_data_list: That must take a heck of a lot of prep work.
That must take a heck of a lot of prep work.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but all that prep made for a darn good
workout, so I actually enjoyed it!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Everyone in town treated me super kindly, like I
was their granddaughter. It was a lotta fun help'n
out with the preparations!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like a real nice place. Is that what your
hometown's like too, Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I remember when Tome and the others
taught me the Kasamatsu Ondo dance... I hope
everyone's doing okay.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I miss my hometown too... Maybe I'll write
ever'one sometime.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I want to send a letter filled with good news, so
I'll hafta train hard!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Same. But to train hard, first I have to sufficiently
fill my belly.

Their love for their hometowns helps motivate
them to train harder.

I'm made doubly aware of this once when I hear
Oguri Cap's stomach grumbling.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What a coincidence! Me too!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there's a wanko soba rest'rant round here.
D'ya want me to take ya there?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
It's owned by the lady who showed me the ropes
as a refiller back home, so I can vouch for the
qual'ty and flavors!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Mmm! Jinkies, her soba always hits the spot!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I could go on eating this forever...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... So this is what authentic wanko soba
tastes like.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, looks like you're runn'n short on refills.
Wouldja like me to lend a hand with the serving?

text_block_list.name: Older Shopkeeper Lady
text_block_list.text:
Wouldja, Yukino? I know you're here as a
customer 'n all, but...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Sure! Leave the refill'n to me!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Heeere ya go! Heeere it comes!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I swear, Oguri, you've got a black hole in place of
your stomach. I know it's all-you-can-eat here,
but go easy on 'em, will ya?

text_block_list.name: Older Shopkeeper Lady
text_block_list.text:
S'no problem at all! Seeing my customers eat'n
plenty and leav'n satisfied is what makes me
happy.

text_block_list.name: Older Shopkeeper Lady
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Yukino! Why, you're a bona fide refill'r
now!

text_block_list.name: Older Shopkeeper Lady
text_block_list.text:
You use to be just a tiny kid carry'n around the
serv'n tray. Everyone'd be so worried watch'n ya.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Awww, c'mon now! Shucks.

Yukino Bijin continues refilling Oguri Cap's bowl
until she's full... I guess this ended up being a
good training session for everyone.
